Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* ******************************************************************************* *)
(** * Bicategories
    Benedikt Ahrens, Marco Maggesi
    February 2018

 Various basic constructions of displayed and non displayed bicategories:
 - Unit displayed bicategory of a displayed 1-category.
 - Full subbicategory of a bicategory.
 - Direct product of bicategories.
 ********************************************************************************* *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.Final.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat. Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispInvertibles.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispAdjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Direct product of two displayed structures over a bicategory.                   *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Section Disp_PreDirprod.
  Context {C : bicat}.
  Variable (D1 D2 : disp_prebicat C).

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
disp_2cell_struct (dirprod_disp_cat_data D1 D2)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
c, c': C
f, g: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
x: f ==> g
d: dirprod_disp_cat_data D1 D2 c
d': dirprod_disp_cat_data D1 D2 c'
f': d -->[ f] d'
g': d -->[ g] d'
UU

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
c, c': C
f, g: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
x: f ==> g
d: D1 c × D2 c
d': D1 c' × D2 c'
f': pr1 d -->[ f] pr1 d' × pr2 d -->[ f] pr2 d'
g': pr1 d -->[ g] pr1 d' × pr2 d -->[ g] pr2 d'
UU

    exact ( (pr1 f' ==>[ x ] pr1 g') × (pr2 f' ==>[ x ] pr2 g')).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
disp_prebicat_ops
  disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
disp_prebicat_ops
  disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), f' ==>[ id₂ f] f'
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), id_disp x ;; f' ==>[ lunitor f] f'
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), f' ;; id_disp y ==>[ runitor f] f'
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp x ;; f'
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] f' ;; id_disp y
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] ff ;; (gg ;; hh)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[
lassociator f g h] ff ;; gg ;; hh
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f g h : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
(λ _ : ∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g1 g2 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : g1 ==> g2)
       (x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
       (y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
       (z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
       (ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
       (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
       gg1 ==>[ r] gg2
       → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2,
 ∏ (a b c : C) (f1 f2 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (r : f1 ==> f2)
 (x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
 (y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
 (z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
 (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
 (gg : y -->[ g] z),
 ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg)
  ?pr17

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), f' ==>[ id₂ f] f'
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b)
(f' : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y),
pr1 f' ==>[ id₂ f] pr1 f' × pr2 f' ==>[ id₂ f] pr2 f'
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
f': pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr1 f' ==>[ id₂ f] pr1 f' × pr2 f' ==>[ id₂ f] pr2 f'

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_id2 _ ) (disp_id2  _)).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), id_disp x ;; f' ==>[ lunitor f] f'
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b)
(f' : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y),
id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 f' ==>[ lunitor f] pr1 f'
× id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 f' ==>[ lunitor f] pr2 f'
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
f': pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 f' ==>[ lunitor f] pr1 f'
× id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 f' ==>[ lunitor f] pr2 f'

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_lunitor _ ) (disp_lunitor  _)).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), f' ;; id_disp y ==>[ runitor f] f'
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b)
(f' : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y),
pr1 f' ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[ runitor f] pr1 f'
× pr2 f' ;; id_disp (pr2 y) ==>[ runitor f] pr2 f'
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
f': pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr1 f' ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[ runitor f] pr1 f'
× pr2 f' ;; id_disp (pr2 y) ==>[ runitor f] pr2 f'

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_runitor _ ) (disp_runitor  _)).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp x ;; f'
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b)
(f' : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y),
pr1 f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 f'
× pr2 f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 f'
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
f': pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr1 f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 f'
× pr2 f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 f'

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_linvunitor _ ) (disp_linvunitor  _)).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] f' ;; id_disp y
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b)
(f' : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y),
pr1 f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] pr1 f' ;; id_disp (pr1 y)
× pr2 f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] pr2 f' ;; id_disp (pr2 y)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
f': pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr1 f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] pr1 f' ;; id_disp (pr1 y)
× pr2 f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] pr2 f' ;; id_disp (pr2 y)

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_rinvunitor _ ) (disp_rinvunitor  _)).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] ff ;; (gg ;; hh)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : D1 a × D2 a) (x : D1 b × D2 b)
(y : D1 c × D2 c) (z : D1 d × D2 d)
(ff : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z),
pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh)
× pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ==>[
  rassociator f g h] pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: D1 a × D2 a
x: D1 b × D2 b
y: D1 c × D2 c
z: D1 d × D2 d
ff: pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh)
× pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ==>[
  rassociator f g h] pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_rassociator _ _ _ ) (disp_rassociator _ _ _)).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[
lassociator f g h] ff ;; gg ;; hh
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : D1 a × D2 a) (x : D1 b × D2 b)
(y : D1 c × D2 c) (z : D1 d × D2 d)
(ff : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z),
pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
lassociator f g h] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh
× pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
  lassociator f g h] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: D1 a × D2 a
x: D1 b × D2 b
y: D1 c × D2 c
z: D1 d × D2 d
ff: pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
lassociator f g h] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh
× pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
  lassociator f g h] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_lassociator _ _ _ ) (disp_lassociator _ _ _)).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f g h : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b : C) (f g h : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h) (x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y),
pr1 ff ==>[ r] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ r] pr2 gg
→ pr1 gg ==>[ s] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ s] pr2 hh
  → pr1 ff ==>[ r • s] pr1 hh
    × pr2 ff ==>[ r • s] pr2 hh
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r: f ==> g
s: g ==> h
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
X: pr1 ff ==>[ r] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ r] pr2 gg
X0: pr1 gg ==>[ s] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ s] pr2 hh
pr1 ff ==>[ r • s] pr1 hh × pr2 ff ==>[ r • s] pr2 hh

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_vcomp2 (pr1 X) (pr1 X0)) (disp_vcomp2 (pr2 X) (pr2 X0))).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2) (x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b)
(z : D1 c × D2 c)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg1 : pr1 y -->[ g1] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g1] pr2 z)
(gg2 : pr1 y -->[ g2] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g2] pr2 z),
pr1 gg1 ==>[ r] pr1 gg2 × pr2 gg1 ==>[ r] pr2 gg2
→ pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg2
  × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg2
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: g1 ==> g2
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg1: pr1 y -->[ g1] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g1] pr2 z
gg2: pr1 y -->[ g2] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g2] pr2 z
X: pr1 gg1 ==>[ r] pr1 gg2 × pr2 gg1 ==>[ r] pr2 gg2
pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg2
× pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg2

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_lwhisker (pr1 ff) (pr1 X)) (disp_lwhisker (pr2 ff) (pr2 X))).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
(λ _ : ∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g1 g2 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : g1 ==> g2)
       (x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
       (y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
       (z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
       (ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
       (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
       gg1 ==>[ r] gg2
       → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2,
 ∏ (a b c : C) (f1 f2 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (r : f1 ==> f2)
 (x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
 (y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
 (z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
 (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
 (gg : y -->[ g] z),
 ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg)
  ((λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
    (g1 g2 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : g1 ==> g2)
    (x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b)
    (z : D1 c × D2 c)
    (ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
    (gg1 : pr1 y -->[ g1] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g1] pr2 z)
    (gg2 : pr1 y -->[ g2] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g2] pr2 z)
    (H : pr1 gg1 ==>[ r] pr1 gg2
         × pr2 gg1 ==>[ r] pr2 gg2),
    make_dirprod (pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 H) (pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 H))
   :
   ∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (r : g1 ==> g2)
   (x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
   (y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
   (z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
   (ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
   (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
   gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
∏ (a b c : C) (f1 f2 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : f1 ==> f2) (x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b)
(z : D1 c × D2 c)
(ff1 : pr1 x -->[ f1] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f1] pr2 y)
(ff2 : pr1 x -->[ f2] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f2] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z),
pr1 ff1 ==>[ r] pr1 ff2 × pr2 ff1 ==>[ r] pr2 ff2
→ pr1 ff1 ;; pr1 gg ==>[ r ▹ g] pr1 ff2 ;; pr1 gg
  × pr2 ff1 ;; pr2 gg ==>[ r ▹ g] pr2 ff2 ;; pr2 gg
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: f1 ==> f2
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff1: pr1 x -->[ f1] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f1] pr2 y
ff2: pr1 x -->[ f2] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f2] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
X: pr1 ff1 ==>[ r] pr1 ff2 × pr2 ff1 ==>[ r] pr2 ff2
pr1 ff1 ;; pr1 gg ==>[ r ▹ g] pr1 ff2 ;; pr1 gg
× pr2 ff1 ;; pr2 gg ==>[ r ▹ g] pr2 ff2 ;; pr2 gg

      apply (make_dirprod (disp_rwhisker (pr1 gg) (pr1 X)) (disp_rwhisker (pr2 gg) (pr2 X))).
  Defined.

  Definition disp_dirprod_prebicat_data : disp_prebicat_data C := _ ,, disp_dirprod_prebicat_ops.

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
disp_prebicat_laws disp_dirprod_prebicat_data

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
disp_prebicat_laws disp_dirprod_prebicat_data

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
disp_id2 ff •• ηη =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg) (id2_left η)
  ηη
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
ηη •• disp_id2 gg =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (id2_right η) ηη
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g h k : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(φ : g ==> h) (ψ : h ==> k)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y)
(kk : x -->[ k] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg)
(φφ : gg ==>[ φ] hh) (ψψ : hh ==>[ ψ] kk),
ηη •• (φφ •• ψψ) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> k, ff ==>[ α] kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ) ((ηη •• φφ) •• ψψ)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff ◃◃ disp_id2 gg =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g) (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
disp_id2 ff ▹▹ gg =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g) (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g h i : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(η : g ==> h) (φ : h ==> i)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z) (hh : y -->[ h] z)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : gg ==>[ η] hh)
(φφ : hh ==>[ φ] ii),
(ff ◃◃ ηη) •• (ff ◃◃ φφ) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ) (ff ◃◃ (ηη •• φφ))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f g h : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (i : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(η : f ==> g) (φ : g ==> h)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg)
(φφ : gg ==>[ φ] hh),
(ηη ▹▹ ii) •• (φφ ▹▹ ii) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · i ==> h · i, ff ;; ii ==>[ α] hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ) ((ηη •• φφ) ▹▹ ii)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
(id_disp x ◃◃ ηη) •• disp_lunitor gg =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> g, id_disp x ;; ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_lunitor f g η) (disp_lunitor ff •• ηη)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
(ηη ▹▹ id_disp y) •• disp_runitor gg =
transportb
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g, ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η) (disp_runitor ff •• ηη)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h i : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (η : h ==> i)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : hh ==>[ η] ii),
(ff ◃◃ (gg ◃◃ ηη)) •• disp_lassociator ff gg ii =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
   ff ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff ;; gg ;; ii)
  (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
  (disp_lassociator ff gg hh •• (ff ;; gg ◃◃ ηη))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g h : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (η : g ==> h)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : gg ==>[ η] hh),
(ff ◃◃ (ηη ▹▹ ii)) •• disp_lassociator ff hh ii =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · i) ==> f · h · i,
   ff ;; (gg ;; ii) ==>[ α] ff ;; hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_lwhisker f i η)
  (disp_lassociator ff gg ii •• ((ff ◃◃ ηη) ▹▹ ii))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (h : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : w -->[ g] x) (hh : x -->[ h] y)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
disp_lassociator ff hh ii •• ((ηη ▹▹ hh) ▹▹ ii) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (h · i) ==> g · h · i,
   ff ;; (hh ;; ii) ==>[ α] gg ;; hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_rwhisker h i η)
  ((ηη ▹▹ hh ;; ii) •• disp_lassociator gg hh ii)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (h i : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(η : f ==> g) (φ : h ==> i)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg)
(φφ : hh ==>[ φ] ii),
(ηη ▹▹ hh) •• (gg ◃◃ φφ) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i, ff ;; hh ==>[ α] gg ;; ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ) ((ff ◃◃ φφ) •• (ηη ▹▹ ii))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y),
disp_lunitor ff •• disp_linvunitor ff =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
   id_disp x ;; ff ==>[ α] id_disp x ;; ff)
  (lunitor_linvunitor f) (disp_id2 (id_disp x ;; ff))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y),
disp_linvunitor ff •• disp_lunitor ff =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f) (disp_id2 ff)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y),
disp_runitor ff •• disp_rinvunitor ff =
transportb
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> f · id₁ b,
   ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] ff ;; id_disp y)
  (runitor_rinvunitor f) (disp_id2 (ff ;; id_disp y))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y),
disp_rinvunitor ff •• disp_runitor ff =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (rinvunitor_runitor f) (disp_id2 ff)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
disp_lassociator ff gg hh •• disp_rassociator ff gg hh =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · (g · h),
   ff ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (lassociator_rassociator f g h)
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; (gg ;; hh)))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
disp_rassociator ff gg hh •• disp_lassociator ff gg hh =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g · h ==> f · g · h,
   ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff ;; gg ;; hh)
  (rassociator_lassociator f g h)
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg ;; hh))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
disp_lassociator ff (id_disp y) gg
•• (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp y ;; gg) ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (runitor_rwhisker f g) (ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d e : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (i : C ⟦ d, e ⟧)
(v : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data e) (ff : v -->[ f] w)
(gg : w -->[ g] x) (hh : x -->[ h] y)
(ii : y -->[ i] z),
((ff ◃◃ disp_lassociator gg hh ii)
 •• disp_lassociator ff (gg ;; hh) ii)
•• (disp_lassociator ff gg hh ▹▹ ii) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
   ff ;; (gg ;; (hh ;; ii)) ==>[
   α] ff ;; gg ;; hh ;; ii)
  (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
  (disp_lassociator ff gg (hh ;; ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (ff ;; gg) hh ii)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
disp_id2 ff •• ηη =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg) (id2_left η)
  ηη
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(ηη : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg),
make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)
  (disp_id2 (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη) =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> g,
   pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (id2_left η) ηη
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)
  (disp_id2 (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη) =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> g,
   pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (id2_left η) ηη

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> g,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (id2_left η) ηη) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
  (id2_left η) (pr1 ηη)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> g,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (id2_left η) ηη) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (id2_left η) (pr2 ηη)

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> g,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (id2_left η) ηη) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
  (id2_left η) (pr1 ηη)
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> g,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (id2_left η) ηη) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (id2_left η) (pr2 ηη)
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
ηη •• disp_id2 gg =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (id2_right η) ηη
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(ηη : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg),
make_dirprod (pr1 ηη •• disp_id2 (pr1 gg))
  (pr2 ηη •• disp_id2 (pr2 gg)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> g,
   pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (id2_right η) ηη
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
make_dirprod (pr1 ηη •• disp_id2 (pr1 gg))
  (pr2 ηη •• disp_id2 (pr2 gg)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> g,
   pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (id2_right η) ηη

pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> g,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (id2_right η) ηη) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
  (id2_right η) (pr1 ηη)

pr2
  (transportb

      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (id2_right η) ηη) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (id2_right η) (pr2 ηη)

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> g,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (id2_right η) ηη) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
  (id2_right η) (pr1 ηη)
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> g,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (id2_right η) ηη) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> g, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (id2_right η) (pr2 ηη)
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g h k : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(φ : g ==> h) (ψ : h ==> k)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y)
(kk : x -->[ k] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg)
(φφ : gg ==>[ φ] hh) (ψψ : hh ==>[ ψ] kk),
ηη •• (φφ •• ψψ) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> k, ff ==>[ α] kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ) ((ηη •• φφ) •• ψψ)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g h k : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(φ : g ==> h) (ψ : h ==> k) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y)
(kk : pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ k] pr2 y)
(ηη : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg)
(φφ : pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ φ] pr2 hh)
(ψψ : pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk × pr2 hh ==>[ ψ] pr2 kk),
make_dirprod (pr1 ηη •• (pr1 φφ •• pr1 ψψ))
  (pr2 ηη •• (pr2 φφ •• pr2 ψψ)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> k,
   pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 kk × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ)
  (make_dirprod ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
     ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g, h, k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
kk: pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ k] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ φ] pr2 hh
ψψ: pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk × pr2 hh ==>[ ψ] pr2 kk
make_dirprod (pr1 ηη •• (pr1 φφ •• pr1 ψψ))
  (pr2 ηη •• (pr2 φφ •• pr2 ψψ)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> k,
   pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 kk × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ)
  (make_dirprod ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
     ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g, h, k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
kk: pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ k] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ φ] pr2 hh
ψψ: pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk × pr2 hh ==>[ ψ] pr2 kk
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> k,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 kk × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 kk)
     (vassocr η φ ψ)
     (make_dirprod ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
        ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> k, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ) ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g, h, k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
kk: pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ k] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ φ] pr2 hh
ψψ: pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk × pr2 hh ==>[ ψ] pr2 kk
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> k,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 kk × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 kk)
     (vassocr η φ ψ)
     (make_dirprod ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
        ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> k, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ) ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ)

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g, h, k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
kk: pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ k] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ φ] pr2 hh
ψψ: pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk × pr2 hh ==>[ ψ] pr2 kk
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> k,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 kk × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 kk)
     (vassocr η φ ψ)
     (make_dirprod ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
        ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> k, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ) ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g, h, k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
kk: pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ k] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ φ] pr2 hh
ψψ: pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk × pr2 hh ==>[ ψ] pr2 kk
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> k,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 kk × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 kk)
     (vassocr η φ ψ)
     (make_dirprod ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
        ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> k, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ) ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ)
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff ◃◃ disp_id2 gg =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g) (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b) (z : D1 c × D2 c)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z),
make_dirprod (pr1 ff ◃◃ disp_id2 (pr1 gg))
  (pr2 ff ◃◃ disp_id2 (pr2 gg)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g)
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
make_dirprod (pr1 ff ◃◃ disp_id2 (pr1 gg))
  (pr2 ff ◃◃ disp_id2 (pr2 gg)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g)
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))

ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
     (lwhisker_id2 f g)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
     (lwhisker_id2 f g)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
     (lwhisker_id2 f g)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
     (lwhisker_id2 f g)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
disp_id2 ff ▹▹ gg =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g) (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b) (z : D1 c × D2 c)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z),
make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff) ▹▹ pr1 gg)
  (disp_id2 (pr2 ff) ▹▹ pr2 gg) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g)
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff) ▹▹ pr1 gg)
  (disp_id2 (pr2 ff) ▹▹ pr2 gg) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g)
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
     (id2_rwhisker f g)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))

a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧

z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
     (id2_rwhisker f g)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))) =

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
     (id2_rwhisker f g)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
     (id2_rwhisker f g)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g h i : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(η : g ==> h) (φ : h ==> i)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z) (hh : y -->[ h] z)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : gg ==>[ η] hh)
(φφ : hh ==>[ φ] ii),
(ff ◃◃ ηη) •• (ff ◃◃ φφ) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i, ff ;; gg ==>[ α] ff ;; ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ) (ff ◃◃ (ηη •• φφ))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g h i : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(η : g ==> h) (φ : h ==> i) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b) (z : D1 c × D2 c)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z)
(hh : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z)
(ii : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z)
(ηη : pr1 gg ==>[ η] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ η] pr2 hh)
(φφ : pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii),
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 ηη) •• (pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ))
  ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 ηη) •• (pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ)
  (make_dirprod (pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ))
     (pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 gg ==>[ η] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ η] pr2 hh
φφ: pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 ηη) •• (pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ))
  ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 ηη) •• (pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ)
  (make_dirprod (pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ))
     (pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ)))

a, b, c: C

ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z

ηη: pr1 gg ==>[ η] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ η] pr2 hh
φφ: pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · i,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii)
     (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ)
     (make_dirprod (pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ))
        (pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ)))) =

  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ)
  (pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ))

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 gg ==>[ η] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ η] pr2 hh
φφ: pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · g ==> f · i,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii)
     (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ)
     (make_dirprod (pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ))
        (pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g ==> f · i,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ)
  (pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ))
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f g h : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (i : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(η : f ==> g) (φ : g ==> h)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg)
(φφ : gg ==>[ φ] hh),
(ηη ▹▹ ii) •• (φφ ▹▹ ii) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · i ==> h · i, ff ;; ii ==>[ α] hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ) ((ηη •• φφ) ▹▹ ii)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f g h : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (i : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(η : f ==> g) (φ : g ==> h) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b) (z : D1 c × D2 c)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y)
(ii : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z)
(ηη : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg)
(φφ : pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ φ] pr2 hh),
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii) •• (pr1 φφ ▹▹ pr1 ii))
  ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii) •• (pr2 φφ ▹▹ pr2 ii)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · i ==> h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii ==>[ α] pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii ==>[ α] pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ)
  (make_dirprod ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) ▹▹ pr1 ii)
     ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) ▹▹ pr2 ii))

D1, D2: disp_prebicat C

z: D1 c × D2 c

gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y

φφ: pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ φ] pr2 hh
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii) •• (pr1 φφ ▹▹ pr1 ii))
  ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii) •• (pr2 φφ ▹▹ pr2 ii)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · i ==> h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii ==>[ α] pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii ==>[ α] pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ)
  (make_dirprod ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) ▹▹ pr1 ii)
     ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) ▹▹ pr2 ii))

  (transportb
     (λ α : f · i ==> h · i,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii ==>[ α] pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii ==>[ α] pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
     (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ)
     (make_dirprod ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) ▹▹ pr1 ii)
        ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) ▹▹ pr2 ii))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · i ==> h · i,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii ==>[ α] pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ)
  ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) ▹▹ pr2 ii)
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
(id_disp x ◃◃ ηη) •• disp_lunitor gg =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> g, id_disp x ;; ff ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_lunitor f g η) (disp_lunitor ff •• ηη)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(ηη : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg),
make_dirprod
  ((id_disp (pr1 x) ◃◃ pr1 ηη)
   •• disp_lunitor (pr1 gg))
  ((id_disp (pr2 x) ◃◃ pr2 ηη)
   •• disp_lunitor (pr2 gg)) =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> g,
   id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg
   × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (vcomp_lunitor f g η)
  (make_dirprod (disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)
     (disp_lunitor (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
make_dirprod
  ((id_disp (pr1 x) ◃◃ pr1 ηη)
   •• disp_lunitor (pr1 gg))
  ((id_disp (pr2 x) ◃◃ pr2 ηη)
   •• disp_lunitor (pr2 gg)) =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> g,
   id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg
   × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (vcomp_lunitor f g η)
  (make_dirprod (disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)
     (disp_lunitor (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> g,
      id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg
      × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (vcomp_lunitor f g η)
     (make_dirprod (disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)
        (disp_lunitor (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη))) =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> g,
   id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
  (vcomp_lunitor f g η)
  (disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)

x: D1 a × D2 a

pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> g,
      id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 gg
      × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)

D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C

x: D1 a × D2 a

      × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (vcomp_lunitor f g η)

 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
(ηη ▹▹ id_disp y) •• disp_runitor gg =
transportb
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g, ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η) (disp_runitor ff •• ηη)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (η : f ==> g)
(x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(ηη : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg),
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ id_disp (pr1 y))
   •• disp_runitor (pr1 gg))
  ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ id_disp (pr2 y))
   •• disp_runitor (pr2 gg)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g,
   pr1 ff ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[ α] pr1 gg
   × pr2 ff ;; id_disp (pr2 y) ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η)
  (make_dirprod (disp_runitor (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)
     (disp_runitor (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη))

   •• disp_runitor (pr1 gg))

pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g,
      pr1 ff ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[ α] pr1 gg

     (vcomp_runitor f g η)

D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: D1 a × D2 a

ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> g,
      pr1 ff ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[ α] pr1 gg
      × pr2 ff ;; id_disp (pr2 y) ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (vcomp_runitor f g η)
     (make_dirprod (disp_runitor (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)
        (disp_runitor (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη))) =

 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h i : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (η : h ==> i)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : hh ==>[ η] ii),
(ff ◃◃ (gg ◃◃ ηη)) •• disp_lassociator ff gg ii =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
   ff ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff ;; gg ;; ii)
  (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
  (disp_lassociator ff gg hh •• (ff ;; gg ◃◃ ηη))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h i : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (η : h ==> i) (w : D1 a × D2 a)
(x : D1 b × D2 b) (y : D1 c × D2 c) (z : D1 d × D2 d)
(ff : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z)
(ii : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z)
(ηη : pr1 hh ==>[ η] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ η] pr2 ii),
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))
   •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 ii))
  ((pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη))
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 ii)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
  (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
  (make_dirprod
     (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
      •• (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))
     (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
      •• (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: h ==> i
w: D1 a × D2 a
x: D1 b × D2 b
y: D1 c × D2 c
z: D1 d × D2 d
ff: pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 hh ==>[ η] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ η] pr2 ii
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))
   •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 ii))
  ((pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη))
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 ii)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
  (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
  (make_dirprod
     (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
      •• (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))
     (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
      •• (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη)))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: h ==> i
w: D1 a × D2 a
x: D1 b × D2 b
y: D1 c × D2 c
z: D1 d × D2 d
ff: pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 hh ==>[ η] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ η] pr2 ii
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
      pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
      α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
        α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
     (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
     (make_dirprod
        (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
         •• (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))
        (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
         •• (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii)
  (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
  (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
   •• (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))

      pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[

      × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[

         •• (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη)))) =

   α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
  (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)

   •• (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: h ==> i
w: D1 a × D2 a
x: D1 b × D2 b
y: D1 c × D2 c
z: D1 d × D2 d
ff: pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 hh ==>[ η] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ η] pr2 ii
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
      pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
      α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
        α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
     (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
     (make_dirprod
        (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
         •• (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))
        (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
         •• (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii)
  (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
  (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
   •• (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).

  (transportb

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g h : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (η : g ==> h)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : gg ==>[ η] hh),
(ff ◃◃ (ηη ▹▹ ii)) •• disp_lassociator ff hh ii =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · i) ==> f · h · i,
   ff ;; (gg ;; ii) ==>[ α] ff ;; hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_lwhisker f i η)
  (disp_lassociator ff gg ii •• ((ff ◃◃ ηη) ▹▹ ii))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g h : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (η : g ==> h) (w : D1 a × D2 a)
(x : D1 b × D2 b) (y : D1 c × D2 c) (z : D1 d × D2 d)
(ff : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y)
(ii : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z)
(ηη : pr1 gg ==>[ η] pr1 hh × pr2 gg ==>[ η] pr2 hh),
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii))
   •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
  ((pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii))
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · i) ==> f · h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii) ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (rwhisker_lwhisker f i η)
  (make_dirprod
     (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 ii)
      •• ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 ηη) ▹▹ pr1 ii))
     (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 ii)
      •• ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 ηη) ▹▹ pr2 ii)))

a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (h : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (η : f ==> g)

(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)

disp_lassociator ff hh ii •• ((ηη ▹▹ hh) ▹▹ ii) =

  (λ α : f · (h · i) ==> g · h · i,
   ff ;; (hh ;; ii) ==>[ α] gg ;; hh ;; ii)
  (rwhisker_rwhisker h i η)
  ((ηη ▹▹ hh ;; ii) •• disp_lassociator gg hh ii)

y: D1 c × D2 c
z: D1 d × D2 d
ff: pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x
gg: pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ g] pr2 x
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (h · i) ==> g · h · i,
      pr1 ff ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii) ==>[
      α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii) ==>[
        α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
     (rwhisker_rwhisker h i η)
     (make_dirprod
        ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
              (pr1 ii))
        ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
              (pr2 ii)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (h · i) ==> g · h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii) ==>[
   α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
  (rwhisker_rwhisker h i η)
  ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: f ==> g
w: D1 a × D2 a
x: D1 b × D2 b
y: D1 c × D2 c
z: D1 d × D2 d
ff: pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x
gg: pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ g] pr2 x
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (h · i) ==> g · h · i,
      pr1 ff ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii) ==>[
      α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii) ==>[
        α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
     (rwhisker_rwhisker h i η)
     (make_dirprod
        ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
              (pr1 ii))
        ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
              (pr2 ii)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (h · i) ==> g · h · i,
   pr2 ff ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii) ==>[
   α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (rwhisker_rwhisker h i η)
  ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii))
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (h i : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(η : f ==> g) (φ : h ==> i)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z)
(ii : y -->[ i] z) (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg)
(φφ : hh ==>[ φ] ii),
(ηη ▹▹ hh) •• (gg ◃◃ φφ) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i, ff ;; hh ==>[ α] gg ;; ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ) ((ff ◃◃ φφ) •• (ηη ▹▹ ii))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (h i : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(η : f ==> g) (φ : h ==> i) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b) (z : D1 c × D2 c)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z)
(ii : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z)
(ηη : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg)
(φφ : pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii),
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 hh) •• (pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 φφ))
  ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 hh) •• (pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 φφ)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[ α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ)
  (make_dirprod
     ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) •• (pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii))
     ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ) •• (pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii
make_dirprod
  ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 hh) •• (pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 φφ))
  ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 hh) •• (pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 φφ)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[ α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ)
  (make_dirprod
     ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) •• (pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii))
     ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ) •• (pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii)))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · h ==> g · i,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[ α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
     (vcomp_whisker η φ)
     (make_dirprod
        ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) •• (pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii))
        ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ) •• (pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ)
  ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) •• (pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii))

D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i

gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z

ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · h ==> g · i,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[ α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)

  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[ α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ)
  ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ) •• (pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii))

D1, D2: disp_prebicat C

gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · h ==> g · i,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[ α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)

   pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ)
  ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) •• (pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii))
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
z: D1 c × D2 c
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
ηη: pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg × pr2 ff ==>[ η] pr2 gg
φφ: pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii × pr2 hh ==>[ φ] pr2 ii
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · h ==> g · i,
      pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ α] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[ α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
     (vcomp_whisker η φ)
     (make_dirprod
        ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) •• (pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii))
        ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ) •• (pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · h ==> g · i,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[ α] pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ)
  ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ) •• (pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii))
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y),
disp_lunitor ff •• disp_linvunitor ff =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
   id_disp x ;; ff ==>[ α] id_disp x ;; ff)
  (lunitor_linvunitor f) (disp_id2 (id_disp x ;; ff))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y),
make_dirprod
  (disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) •• disp_linvunitor (pr1 ff))
  (disp_lunitor (pr2 ff) •• disp_linvunitor (pr2 ff)) =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
   id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
   α] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff
   × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[
     α] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)
  (lunitor_linvunitor f)
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff))
     (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
make_dirprod
  (disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) •• disp_linvunitor (pr1 ff))
  (disp_lunitor (pr2 ff) •• disp_linvunitor (pr2 ff)) =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
   id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
   α] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff
   × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[
     α] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)
  (lunitor_linvunitor f)
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff))
     (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)))

y: D1 b × D2 b

pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
      id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
      α] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff
      × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[
        α] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)
     (lunitor_linvunitor f)
     (make_dirprod
        (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff))
        (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
   id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
   α] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff)
  (lunitor_linvunitor f)
  (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff))

D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
      id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
      α] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff
      × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[
        α] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)
     (lunitor_linvunitor f)
     (make_dirprod
        (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff))
        (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)))) =

  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
      id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
      α] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff
      × id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[
        α] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)
     (lunitor_linvunitor f)
     (make_dirprod
        (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff))
        (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
   id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[
   α] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff)
  (lunitor_linvunitor f)
  (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff))
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y),
disp_linvunitor ff •• disp_lunitor ff =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f) (disp_id2 ff)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y),
make_dirprod
  (disp_linvunitor (pr1 ff) •• disp_lunitor (pr1 ff))
  (disp_linvunitor (pr2 ff) •• disp_lunitor (pr2 ff)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> f,
   pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f)
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
make_dirprod
  (disp_linvunitor (pr1 ff) •• disp_lunitor (pr1 ff))
  (disp_linvunitor (pr2 ff) •• disp_lunitor (pr2 ff)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> f,
   pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f)
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> f,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
     (linvunitor_lunitor f)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> f,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
     (linvunitor_lunitor f)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> f,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
     (linvunitor_lunitor f)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D1 a × D2 a
y: D1 b × D2 b
ff: pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> f,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
     (linvunitor_lunitor f)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff))
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b) (ff : x -->[ f] y),
disp_runitor ff •• disp_rinvunitor ff =
transportb
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> f · id₁ b,
   ff ;; id_disp y ==>[ α] ff ;; id_disp y)
  (runitor_rinvunitor f) (disp_id2 (ff ;; id_disp y))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : D1 a × D2 a)
(y : D1 b × D2 b)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y),
make_dirprod
  (disp_runitor (pr1 ff) •• disp_rinvunitor (pr1 ff))
  (disp_runitor (pr2 ff) •• disp_rinvunitor (pr2 ff)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · id₁ b ==> f · id₁ b,
   pr1 ff ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; id_disp (pr1 y)
   × pr2 ff ;; id_disp (pr2 y) ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; id_disp (pr2 y))
  (runitor_rinvunitor f)
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; id_disp (pr1 y)))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; id_disp (pr2 y))))

disp_rinvunitor ff •• disp_runitor ff =

  (rinvunitor_runitor f) (disp_id2 ff)

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
disp_lassociator ff gg hh •• disp_rassociator ff gg hh =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · (g · h),
   ff ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (lassociator_rassociator f g h)
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; (gg ;; hh)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : D1 a × D2 a) (x : D1 b × D2 b)
(y : D1 c × D2 c) (z : D1 d × D2 d)
(ff : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z),
make_dirprod
  (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
   •• disp_rassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh))
  (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
   •• disp_rassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · (g · h),
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh)
   × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh))
  (lassociator_rassociator f g h)
  (make_dirprod
     (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh)))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh))))

     (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh)))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh))))

a: C

(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : D1 a × D2 a) (x : D1 b × D2 b)
(y : D1 c × D2 c) (z : D1 d × D2 d)
(ff : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x)
(gg : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y)
(hh : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z),
make_dirprod
  (disp_rassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
