  (disp_rassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g · h ==> f · g · h,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)
  (rassociator_lassociator f g h)
  (make_dirprod
     (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: D1 a × D2 a
x: D1 b × D2 b
y: D1 c × D2 c
z: D1 d × D2 d
ff: pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ f] pr2 x
gg: pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ g] pr2 y
hh: pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ h] pr2 z
make_dirprod
  (disp_rassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh))
  (disp_rassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g · h ==> f · g · h,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh
   × pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)
  (rassociator_lassociator f g h)
  (make_dirprod
     (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)))

 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

y: D1 c × D2 c
z: D1 d × D2 d

      pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ==>[

 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
disp_lassociator ff (id_disp y) gg
•• (disp_runitor ff ▹▹ gg) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   ff ;; (id_disp y ;; gg) ==>[ α] ff ;; gg)
  (runitor_rwhisker f g) (ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor gg)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : D1 a × D2 a) (y : D1 b × D2 b) (z : D1 c × D2 c)
(ff : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
(gg : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ g] pr2 z),
make_dirprod
  (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (id_disp (pr1 y))
     (pr1 gg) •• (disp_runitor (pr1 ff) ▹▹ pr1 gg))
  (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (id_disp (pr2 y))
     (pr2 gg) •• (disp_runitor (pr2 ff) ▹▹ pr2 gg)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (id₁ b · g) ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; (id_disp (pr1 y) ;; pr1 gg) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg
   × pr2 ff ;; (id_disp (pr2 y) ;; pr2 gg) ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) (runitor_rwhisker f g)
  (make_dirprod (pr1 ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor (pr1 gg))
     (pr2 ff ◃◃ disp_lunitor (pr2 gg)))

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d e : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (i : C ⟦ d, e ⟧)
(v : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data a)
(w : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data b)
(x : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data c)
(y : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data d)
(z : disp_dirprod_prebicat_data e) (ff : v -->[ f] w)
(gg : w -->[ g] x) (hh : x -->[ h] y)
(ii : y -->[ i] z),
((ff ◃◃ disp_lassociator gg hh ii)
 •• disp_lassociator ff (gg ;; hh) ii)
•• (disp_lassociator ff gg hh ▹▹ ii) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
   ff ;; (gg ;; (hh ;; ii)) ==>[
   α] ff ;; gg ;; hh ;; ii)
  (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
  (disp_lassociator ff gg (hh ;; ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (ff ;; gg) hh ii)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a: C
∏ (b c d e : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (i : C ⟦ d, e ⟧) (v : D1 a × D2 a)
(w : D1 b × D2 b) (x : D1 c × D2 c) (y : D1 d × D2 d)
(z : D1 e × D2 e)
(ff : pr1 v -->[ f] pr1 w × pr2 v -->[ f] pr2 w)
(gg : pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ g] pr2 x)
(hh : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y)
(ii : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z),
make_dirprod
  (((pr1 ff
     ◃◃ disp_lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
    •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh)
         (pr1 ii))
   •• (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
       ▹▹ pr1 ii))
  (((pr2 ff
     ◃◃ disp_lassociator (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii))
    •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)
         (pr2 ii))
   •• (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
       ▹▹ pr2 ii)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
  (make_dirprod
     (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
        (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
      •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
           (pr1 ii))
     (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
        (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
      •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
           (pr2 ii)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
v: D1 a × D2 a
w: D1 b × D2 b
x: D1 c × D2 c
y: D1 d × D2 d
z: D1 e × D2 e
ff: pr1 v -->[ f] pr1 w × pr2 v -->[ f] pr2 w
gg: pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ g] pr2 x
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
make_dirprod
  (((pr1 ff
     ◃◃ disp_lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
    •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh)
         (pr1 ii))
   •• (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
       ▹▹ pr1 ii))
  (((pr2 ff
     ◃◃ disp_lassociator (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii))
    •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)
         (pr2 ii))
   •• (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
       ▹▹ pr2 ii)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
   × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
     α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
  (make_dirprod
     (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
        (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
      •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
           (pr1 ii))
     (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
        (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
      •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
           (pr2 ii)))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
v: D1 a × D2 a
w: D1 b × D2 b
x: D1 c × D2 c
y: D1 d × D2 d
z: D1 e × D2 e
ff: pr1 v -->[ f] pr1 w × pr2 v -->[ f] pr2 w
gg: pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ g] pr2 x
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
      pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)) ==>[
      α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
        α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
     (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
     (make_dirprod
        (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
           (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
              (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
        (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
           (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
              (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
  (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
  (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
     (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
        (pr1 ii))

D1, D2: disp_prebicat C

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

w: D1 b × D2 b
x: D1 c × D2 c
y: D1 d × D2 d
z: D1 e × D2 e
ff: pr1 v -->[ f] pr1 w × pr2 v -->[ f] pr2 w
gg: pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ g] pr2 x
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
      pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)) ==>[
      α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
        α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
     (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
     (make_dirprod
        (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
           (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
              (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
        (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
           (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
              (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
   pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
   α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
  (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
     (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
        (pr2 ii))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
v: D1 a × D2 a
w: D1 b × D2 b
x: D1 c × D2 c
y: D1 d × D2 d
z: D1 e × D2 e
ff: pr1 v -->[ f] pr1 w × pr2 v -->[ f] pr2 w
gg: pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ g] pr2 x
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
      pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)) ==>[
      α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
        α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
     (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
     (make_dirprod
        (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
           (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
              (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
        (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
           (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
              (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)) ==>[
   α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
  (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
  (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
     (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
        (pr1 ii))
 exact (@pr1_transportf (_ ==> _) _ (λ a _ , _ ) _ _ _ _  ).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_prebicat C
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
v: D1 a × D2 a
w: D1 b × D2 b
x: D1 c × D2 c
y: D1 d × D2 d
z: D1 e × D2 e
ff: pr1 v -->[ f] pr1 w × pr2 v -->[ f] pr2 w
gg: pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x × pr2 w -->[ g] pr2 x
hh: pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y × pr2 x -->[ h] pr2 y
ii: pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z × pr2 y -->[ i] pr2 z
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
      pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)) ==>[
      α] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii
      × pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
        α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
     (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
     (make_dirprod
        (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
           (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
              (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
        (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
           (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
         •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)
              (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii)))) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
   pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
   α] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
  (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
     (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
        (pr2 ii))
 apply (@pr2_transportf (_ ==> _) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) (λ a, _ ==>[a]_ ) ).
  Qed.

  Definition disp_dirprod_prebicat : disp_prebicat C := _ ,, disp_dirprod_brebicat_laws.
End Disp_PreDirprod.

Section Disp_Dirprod.
  Context {C : bicat}.
  Variable (D1 D2 : disp_bicat C).

gg: aa -->[ g] bb

  Defined.

  (** Local Univalence of the poduct *)
  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 xx)
× is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 xx)
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H1: is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 xx)
H2: is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 xx)
(λ y : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)) ?pr1

gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff

(λ y : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg))
  (disp_inv_cell (pr1 xx,, H1),,
   disp_inv_cell (pr2 xx,, H2))

transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff)),,
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b

gg: aa -->[ g] bb
disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
→ disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
→ disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg

× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg

D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
(λ x0 : ff ==>[ x] gg, is_disp_invertible_2cell x x0)
  ?pr1

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)

 apply H.
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
pr2 ff ==>[ x] pr2 gg
 apply H.
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
(λ x0 : ff ==>[ x] gg, is_disp_invertible_2cell x x0)
  ((let X := pr1 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
   (let X := pr2 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
is_disp_invertible_2cell x
  (pr1
     ((let X := pr1 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
      (let X := pr2 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
× is_disp_invertible_2cell x
    (pr2
       ((let X := pr1 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
        (let X := pr2 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
is_disp_invertible_2cell x
  (pr1
     ((let X := pr1 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
      (let X := pr2 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
is_disp_invertible_2cell x
  (pr2
     ((let X := pr1 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
      (let X := pr2 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
is_disp_invertible_2cell x
  (pr1
     ((let X := pr1 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
      (let X := pr2 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
 exact (pr2 (pr1 H)).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
is_disp_invertible_2cell x
  (pr2
     ((let X := pr1 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
      (let X := pr2 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
 exact (pr2 (pr2 H)).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 xx)

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 xx)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 xx)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 gg ==>[ x ^-1] pr1 ff
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(λ y : pr1 gg ==>[ x ^-1] pr1 ff,
 pr1 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
 × y •• pr1 xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 gg))) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 gg ==>[ x ^-1] pr1 ff
 exact (pr1 (pr1 H)).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(λ y : pr1 gg ==>[ x ^-1] pr1 ff,
 pr1 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
 × y •• pr1 xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 gg))) (pr11 H)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 xx •• pr11 H =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr11 H •• pr1 xx =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 gg))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 xx •• pr11 H =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1
  (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))

        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> f,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
     (vcomp_rinv x)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))

        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 ff ==>[ x • x ^-1] pr1 ff
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr2 ff ==>[ x • x ^-1] pr2 ff

        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 ff ==>[ x • x ^-1] pr1 ff
 exact (transportb (λ z, _ ==>[z] _) (vcomp_rinv _) (disp_id2 _)).
        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr2 ff ==>[ x • x ^-1] pr2 ff
 exact (transportb (λ z, _ ==>[z] _) (vcomp_rinv _) (disp_id2 _)).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr11 H •• pr1 xx =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 gg))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1
  (transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)) =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 gg))

        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C

bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : g ==> g,
      pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (vcomp_linv x)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 gg)))) =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr1 gg))

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb

H: disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
(λ x0 : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell x x0) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg
 apply H.
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
(λ x0 : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell x x0)
  (let X := pr1 H in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 H)

      apply H.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 xx)

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 xx)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 xx)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr2 gg ==>[ x ^-1] pr2 ff
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(λ y : pr2 gg ==>[ x ^-1] pr2 ff,
 pr2 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff))
 × y •• pr2 xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 gg))) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr2 gg ==>[ x ^-1] pr2 ff
 exact (pr2 (pr1 H)).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(λ y : pr2 gg ==>[ x ^-1] pr2 ff,
 pr2 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff))
 × y •• pr2 xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 gg))) (pr21 H)
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr2 xx •• pr21 H =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr21 H •• pr2 xx =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 gg))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr2 xx •• pr21 H =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
dirprod_pr2
  (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff))

        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
dirprod_pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : f ==> f,
      pr1 ff ==>[ α] pr1 ff × pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
     (vcomp_rinv x)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)))) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, pr2 ff ==>[ α] pr2 ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 ff))

        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 ff ==>[ x • x ^-1] pr1 ff
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb

H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr2 ff ==>[ x • x ^-1] pr2 ff

        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 ff ==>[ x • x ^-1] pr1 ff
 exact (transportb (λ z, _ ==>[z] _) (vcomp_rinv _) (disp_id2 _)).
        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr2 ff ==>[ x • x ^-1] pr2 ff
 exact (transportb (λ z, _ ==>[z] _) (vcomp_rinv _) (disp_id2 _)).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr21 H •• pr2 xx =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 gg))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C

dirprod_pr2
  (transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)) =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 gg))

H: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
dirprod_pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : g ==> g,
      pr1 gg ==>[ α] pr1 gg × pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
     (vcomp_linv x)
     (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 gg))
        (disp_id2 (pr2 gg)))) =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, pr2 gg ==>[ α] pr2 gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 (pr2 gg))

D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb

pr2 ff ==>[ x] pr2 gg
 apply H.
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
(λ x0 : pr2 ff ==>[ x] pr2 gg,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell x x0)
  (let X := pr1 H in let X0 := pr2 X in X0)

D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C

gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg

      apply H.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
≃ disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
→ disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
 exact (pair_disp_invertible_2cell x).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
→ disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
  × disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏
x0 : disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
     × disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg),
?g (pair_disp_invertible_2cell x x0) = x0
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏ y : disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg,
pair_disp_invertible_2cell x (?g y) = y

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏
x0 : disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
     × disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg),
(λ H : disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg,
 pr1_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg H,,
 pr2_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg H)
  (pair_disp_invertible_2cell x x0) = x0
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
pr1_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
  (pair_disp_invertible_2cell x H),,
pr2_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
  (pair_disp_invertible_2cell x H) = H

        
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
pr1_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
  (pair_disp_invertible_2cell x H) = pr1 H

pr2_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
  (pair_disp_invertible_2cell x H) = pr2 H

f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb

× disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏ y : disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg,
pair_disp_invertible_2cell x
  ((λ H : disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg,
    pr1_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg H,,
    pr2_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg H) y) = y

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
H: disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg
pr1

     (pr1_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg H,,
      pr2_disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg H)) = pr1 H
 reflexivity.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb) p ff = gg
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f g p) ff gg

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb) p ff = gg
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f g p) ff gg

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb) p ff = gg
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f g p) (pr1 ff)
    (pr1 gg)
  × disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f g p) (pr2 ff)
      (pr2 gg)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb) p ff = gg
≃ transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, pr1 aa -->[ z] pr1 bb)
    p (pr1 ff) = pr1 gg
  × transportf
      (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, pr2 aa -->[ z] pr2 bb) p
      (pr2 ff) = pr2 gg

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] bb
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
ff = gg ≃ pr1 ff = pr1 gg × pr2 ff = pr2 gg

    apply WeakEquivalences.pathsdirprodweq.
  Defined.

disp_univalent_2_1 disp_dirprod_bicat

gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isweq (disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_dirprod_bicat p ff gg)

bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb) p ff = gg
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f g p) ff gg
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b

gg: aa -->[ g] bb
?w ~ disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_dirprod_bicat p ff gg

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb) p ff = gg
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f g p) ff gg
 exact (prod_idtoiso_2_1 p ff gg HD1 HD2).
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
prod_idtoiso_2_1 p ff gg HD1 HD2 ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_dirprod_bicat p ff gg
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
q: transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb) p ff =
gg
prod_idtoiso_2_1 p ff gg HD1 HD2 q =
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_dirprod_bicat p ff gg q

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
prod_idtoiso_2_1 (idpath f) ff
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
     (idpath f) ff) HD1 HD2
  (idpath
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
        (idpath f) ff)) =
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_dirprod_bicat (idpath f) ff
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
     (idpath f) ff)
  (idpath
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
        (idpath f) ff))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)))
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
pr1
  (prod_idtoiso_2_1 (idpath f) ff
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
        (idpath f) ff) HD1 HD2
     (idpath
        (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
           (idpath f) ff))) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_dirprod_bicat (idpath f) ff
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
        (idpath f) ff)
     (idpath
        (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
           (idpath f) ff)))

      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
x: ff ==>[
idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)] transportf
                              (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
                               aa -->[ z] bb)
                              (idpath f) ff
isaprop
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) x)

        apply (@isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell C disp_dirprod_bicat).
      
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_univalent_2_1 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2_1 D2
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
pr1
  (prod_idtoiso_2_1 (idpath f) ff
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
        (idpath f) ff) HD1 HD2
     (idpath
        (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
           (idpath f) ff))) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_dirprod_bicat (idpath f) ff
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
        (idpath f) ff)
     (idpath
        (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
           (idpath f) ff)))
 reflexivity.
  Defined.

  (** Global Univalence of the product *)
  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f: adjoint_equivalence a b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr1 ff)
× disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr2 ff)
→ disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f ff

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f: adjoint_equivalence a b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr1 ff)
× disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr2 ff)
→ disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f ff

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f: adjoint_equivalence a b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
H: disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr1 ff)
× disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr2 ff)
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f ff

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f: adjoint_equivalence a b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
H: disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr1 ff)
× disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr2 ff)
disp_left_adjoint_data f ff
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f: adjoint_equivalence a b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
H: disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr1 ff)
× disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f (pr2 ff)
(λ ααd : disp_left_adjoint_data f ff,
 disp_left_adjoint_axioms f ααd
 × disp_left_equivalence_axioms f ααd) ?pr1

  ((((disp_linvunitor (pr1 ff)
      •• (disp_left_adjoint_unit (pr12 f) (pr11 H)
          ▹▹ pr1 ff))
     •• disp_rassociator (pr1 ff)
          (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
             (pr11 H)) (pr1 ff))

  (internal_triangle1 (pr12 f))
  (make_dirprod (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
     (disp_id2 (pr2 ff)))

  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
  (id₁ b · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
  (((rinvunitor (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
     • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f
        ◃ left_adjoint_unit f))
    • lassociator (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f) f
        (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f))
   • (left_adjoint_counit f
      ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint f))
  (lunitor (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f))] disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                              f
                                              (pr2 H)
 exact (transportb (λ z, _ ==>[z] _) (internal_triangle2 f) (disp_id2 _)).

(((disp_linvunitor (pr1 ff)
   •• (pr1 (disp_left_adjoint_unit (pr12 f) (pr1 H))
       ▹▹ pr1 ff))
  •• disp_rassociator (pr1 ff)

             (pr1 H))) (pr1 ff))

     ◃◃ pr1
          (disp_left_adjoint_counit (pr12 f) (pr1 H))))
•• disp_runitor (pr1 ff) =

  (λ x : pr1 f ==> pr1 f, pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 ff)

   x] pr1

           (pr1 H)))
  (Adjunctions.internal_triangle2 (pr12 f))
  (disp_id2
     (pr1
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H))))

pr1 ff ==>[
(((linvunitor f • (left_adjoint_unit f ▹ f))
  • rassociator f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f) f)
 • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit f)) • runitor f] pr1 ff

a, b: C

H: disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f ff
(((disp_rinvunitor
     (pr1
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H)))
   •• (pr1
         (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
            (pr1 H))
       ◃◃ pr1
            (disp_left_adjoint_unit (pr12 f) (pr1 H))))
  •• disp_lassociator
       (pr1
          (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
             (pr1 H))) (pr1 ff)
       (pr1
          (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
             (pr1 H))))
 •• (pr1 (disp_left_adjoint_counit (pr12 f) (pr1 H))
     ▹▹ pr1
          (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
             (pr1 H))))
•• disp_lunitor
     (pr1
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H))) =
transportb
  (λ x : left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 f) ==>
         left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 f),
   pr1
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f) (pr1 H)) ==>[
   x] pr1
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H)))
  (Adjunctions.internal_triangle2 (pr12 f))
  (disp_id2
     (pr1
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H))))
 
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f: adjoint_equivalence a b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
H: disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f ff
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ x : left_adjoint_right_adjoint f ==>
            left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,
      disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint f (pr1 H) ==>[
      x] disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint f (pr1 H))
     (Adjunctions.internal_triangle2 f)
     (disp_id2
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint f (pr1 H)))) =
transportb
  (λ x : left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 f) ==>
         left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 f),
   pr1
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f) (pr1 H)) ==>[
   x] pr1
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H)))
  (Adjunctions.internal_triangle2 (pr12 f))
  (disp_id2
     (pr1
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H))))

        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H))) =

  (λ x : left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 f) ==>
         left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 f),
   pr2
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f) (pr1 H)) ==>[
   x] pr2
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H)))
  (Adjunctions.internal_triangle2 (pr12 f))
  (disp_id2
     (pr2

D1, D2: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f: adjoint_equivalence a b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b

dirprod_pr2
  (transportb
     (λ x : left_adjoint_right_adjoint f ==>
            left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,
      disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint f (pr1 H) ==>[
      x] disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint f (pr1 H))
     (Adjunctions.internal_triangle2 f)
     (disp_id2
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint f (pr1 H)))) =
transportb
  (λ x : left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 f) ==>
         left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 f),
   pr2
     (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f) (pr1 H)) ==>[
   x] pr2
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H)))
  (Adjunctions.internal_triangle2 (pr12 f))
  (disp_id2
     (pr2
        (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 f)
           (pr1 H))))

                                              (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 f

                                                 H))

f: adjoint_equivalence a b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
A: disp_adjoint_equivalence f (pr1 aa) (pr1 bb)
× disp_adjoint_equivalence f (pr2 aa) (pr2 bb)
pr1
  (pr1_adjoint_equivalence f aa bb
     (pair_adjoint_equivalence f aa bb A)) = pr11 A
 reflexivity.

× disp_adjoint_equivalence f (pr2 aa) (pr2 bb)
pr2_adjoint_equivalence f aa bb
  (pair_adjoint_equivalence f aa bb A) = pr2 A

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
HD1: disp_univalent_2 D1
HD2: disp_univalent_2 D2
a, b: C
p: a = b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
transportf (λ z : C, disp_dirprod_bicat z) p aa = bb
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 a b p) aa bb

C: bicat

HD2: disp_univalent_2 D2
a, b: C
p: a = b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
transportf (λ z : C, disp_dirprod_bicat z) p aa = bb
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 a b p)
    (pr1 aa) (pr1 bb)
  × disp_adjoint_equivalence (idtoiso_2_0 a b p)
      (pr2 aa) (pr2 bb)

HD2: disp_univalent_2 D2
a, b: C
p: a = b
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
transportf (λ z : C, disp_dirprod_bicat z) p aa = bb
≃ transportf (λ z : C, D1 z) p (pr1 aa) = pr1 bb
  × transportf (λ z : C, D2 z) p (pr2 aa) = pr2 bb

a: C
aa, bb: disp_dirprod_bicat a
aa = bb ≃ pr1 aa = pr1 bb × pr2 aa = pr2 bb

    apply WeakEquivalences.pathsdirprodweq.
  Defined.

C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_2cells_isaprop D1
HD2: disp_2cells_isaprop D2
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_dirprod_bicat

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_2cells_isaprop D1
HD2: disp_2cells_isaprop D2
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_dirprod_bicat

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_2cells_isaprop D1
HD2: disp_2cells_isaprop D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (ff ==>[ x] gg)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_2cells_isaprop D1
HD2: disp_2cells_isaprop D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_2cells_isaprop D1
HD2: disp_2cells_isaprop D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (pr2 ff ==>[ x] pr2 gg)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_2cells_isaprop D1
HD2: disp_2cells_isaprop D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg)
 apply HD1.
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_2cells_isaprop D1
HD2: disp_2cells_isaprop D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (pr2 ff ==>[ x] pr2 gg)
 apply HD2.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_locally_groupoid D1
HD2: disp_locally_groupoid D2
disp_locally_groupoid disp_dirprod_bicat

  
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_locally_groupoid D1
HD2: disp_locally_groupoid D2
disp_locally_groupoid disp_dirprod_bicat

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_locally_groupoid D1
HD2: disp_locally_groupoid D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_locally_groupoid D1
HD2: disp_locally_groupoid D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 xx)
× is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 xx)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_locally_groupoid D1
HD2: disp_locally_groupoid D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 xx)
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_locally_groupoid D1
HD2: disp_locally_groupoid D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 xx)

    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_locally_groupoid D1
HD2: disp_locally_groupoid D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr1 xx)
 apply HD1.
    
C: bicat
D1, D2: disp_bicat C
HD1: disp_locally_groupoid D1
HD2: disp_locally_groupoid D2
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x (pr2 xx)
 apply HD2.
  Qed.

End Disp_Dirprod.

(**
 Invertible 2-cells in the total bicategory
 *)

B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell (pr1 f,, pr12 f) (pr1 g,, pr12 g)


B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell (pr1 f,, pr12 f) (pr1 g,, pr12 g)

  
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr1 f,, pr12 f) ==> (pr1 g,, pr12 g)
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell ?η

  
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr1 f,, pr12 f) ==> (pr1 g,, pr12 g)
 exact (pr11 α ,, pr121 α).
  
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell (pr11 α,, pr121 α)
 
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr1 g,, pr12 g) ==> (pr1 f,, pr12 f)
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr11 α,, pr121 α) • ?φ = id₂ (pr1 f,, pr12 f)
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
?φ • (pr11 α,, pr121 α) = id₂ (pr1 g,, pr12 g)

    
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr1 g,, pr12 g) ==> (pr1 f,, pr12 f)
 exact (pr1 α^-1 ,, pr12 α^-1).
    
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr11 α,, pr121 α) • (pr1 α ^-1,, pr12 α ^-1) =
id₂ (pr1 f,, pr12 f)
 abstract
        (use total2_paths_f ; [ apply (maponpaths pr1 (vcomp_rinv α)) | ] ;
         cbn ;
         refine (_ @ maponpaths pr1 (fiber_paths (vcomp_rinv α))) ;
         refine (!_) ;
         apply (@pr1_transportf
                  (pr1 f ==> pr1 f)
                  (λ z, pr12 f ==>[ z ] pr12 f)
                  (λ z _, pr22 f ==>[ z ] pr22 f))).
    
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr1 α ^-1,, pr12 α ^-1) • (pr11 α,, pr121 α) =
id₂ (pr1 g,, pr12 g)
 abstract
        (use total2_paths_f ; [ apply (maponpaths pr1 (vcomp_linv α)) | ] ;
         cbn ;
         refine (_ @ maponpaths pr1 (fiber_paths (vcomp_linv α))) ;
         refine (!_) ;
         apply (@pr1_transportf
                  (pr1 g ==> pr1 g)
                  (λ z, pr12 g ==>[ z ] pr12 g)
                  (λ z _, pr22 g ==>[ z ] pr22 g))).
Defined.


B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell (pr1 f,, pr22 f) (pr1 g,, pr22 g)


B: bicat

α: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell (pr1 f,, pr22 f) (pr1 g,, pr22 g)

f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr1 f,, pr22 f) ==> (pr1 g,, pr22 g)

(pr1 f,, pr22 f) ==> (pr1 g,, pr22 g)
 exact (pr11 α ,, pr221 α).

x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧

f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧

(pr11 α,, pr221 α) • ?φ = id₂ (pr1 f,, pr22 f)
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
?φ • (pr11 α,, pr221 α) = id₂ (pr1 g,, pr22 g)

    
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr1 g,, pr22 g) ==> (pr1 f,, pr22 f)
 exact (pr1 α^-1 ,, pr22 α^-1).
    
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr11 α,, pr221 α) • (pr1 α ^-1,, pr22 α ^-1) =
id₂ (pr1 f,, pr22 f)
 abstract
        (use total2_paths_f ; [ apply (maponpaths pr1 (vcomp_rinv α)) | ] ;
         cbn ;
         refine (_ @ maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (fiber_paths (vcomp_rinv α))) ;
         refine (!_) ;
         apply (@pr2_transportf
                  (pr1 f ==> pr1 f)
                  (λ z, pr12 f ==>[ z ] pr12 f)
                  (λ z, pr22 f ==>[ z ] pr22 f))).
    
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)
f, g: total_bicat (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂) ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
(pr1 α ^-1,, pr22 α ^-1) • (pr11 α,, pr221 α) =
id₂ (pr1 g,, pr22 g)
 abstract
        (use total2_paths_f ; [ apply (maponpaths pr1 (vcomp_linv α)) | ] ;
         cbn ;
         refine (_ @ maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (fiber_paths (vcomp_linv α))) ;
         refine (!_) ;
         apply (@pr2_transportf
                  (pr1 g ==> pr1 g)
                  (λ z, pr12 g ==>[ z ] pr12 g)
                  (λ z, pr22 g ==>[ z ] pr22 g))).
Defined.


B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
D₁_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₁
D₂_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₂
disp_2cells_iscontr (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)


B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
D₁_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₁
D₂_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₂
disp_2cells_iscontr (disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂)

  
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
D₁_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₁
D₂_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₂
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
iscontr (ff ==>[ x] gg)

  
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
D₁_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₁
D₂_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₂
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
iscontr (pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg)
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
D₁_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₁
D₂_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₂
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
iscontr (pr2 ff ==>[ x] pr2 gg)

  
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
D₁_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₁
D₂_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₂
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
iscontr (pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg)
 apply D₁_contr.
  
B: bicat
D₁, D₂: disp_bicat B
D₁_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₁
D₂_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D₂
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ a
bb: disp_dirprod_bicat D₁ D₂ b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
iscontr (pr2 ff ==>[ x] pr2 gg)
 apply D₂_contr.
Qed.
